Writer John Hughes also penned The Breakfast Club, Ferris Bueller's Day Off and Uncle Buck. Oscar nominated actress Annette Bening (American Beauty) makes her film debut as Dan Aykroyd's cranky wife.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way. From the director of Fast Times at Ridgemont High comes a 'teenagers save the world' comedy based loosely on Jane Austin's Emma, that elevated Alicia Silverstone from that Aerosmith girl to a star in the making.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: Newly elected to Congress, Evan Baxter has his life turned upside-down when God appears and mysteriously commands him to build an ark. However, his perplexed family can't decide whether Evan is having an extraordinary mid-life crisis or is truly onto something of Biblical proportions.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Life flips over for a small-town pizzeria owner and poet who inherits $40 billion. Sleazy moguls come to whisk him and his money away to corporate America.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Ditched by his parents as a child, Joe Dirt has had to raise himself. Now grown up and working as a janitor Joe sets out to find the parents who abandoned him. Along the way, he befriends a high school janitor, an alligator trainer, the beautiful but untouchable Brandy, and Robby, Joe's rival for her attention. Eventually Joe makes his way to Los Angeles, where a shock-jock brings him on his radio show to make fun of him. But as Joe recounts his story, listeners are captivated, and an entire city starts to tune in daily to hear the adventures of Joe Dirt. Soon audiences worldwide join to help this unlikely hero unearth the mystery of his family's disappearance, with startling results.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world! After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, the three-time defending champs worry that they've lost their harmony for good. With one chance left at redeeming their legacy, they must they must face off against the toughest competition on the planet: German supergroup Das Sound Machine and fight for their right to win at the World Championships of A Cappella. It will take the power of sisterhood to find their voice and see what it takes to be the world's top pitches!

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: Nicholas Angel is a big-city cop who can't be stopped - but he's making everyone else on the force look bad. When he is reassigned to a small, quiet town, he struggles with this new, seemingly idyllic world and his bumbling partner. But their dull existence is interrupted by several grisly and suspicious accidents, and the crime-fighting duo turn up the heat and hand out high-octane, car-chasing, gun-fighting, big-city justice.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: The Cat in the Hat who goes by that name is played by Mike Myers of comedy fame! It starts with two kids on a cold, cold wet day their mum is at work and they've no games to play! Then in walks the fun in the form of a Cat who pulls out the laughs from the brim of his hat. Things really get wild when the Cat and his crew (who go by the name of Thing One and Thing Two) take over the house of Conrad and Sally in this fine family film that's right up your alley!

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three men relive their carefree college years by killing off as many brain cells as possible in this over-the-top comedy. Mitch returns home from a less-than-pleasant business trip one evening to discover his wife, Heidi, involved in a menage a trois with two blindfolded strangers. Feeling less than welcome at home after this, Mitch rents a house near the campus of a nearby college; two of Mitch's old college buddies, Beanie and Frank, stop by to cheer him up. They soon become regular guests at Mitch's place.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: Newly elected to Congress, Evan Baxter has his life turned upside-down when God appears and mysteriously commands him to build an ark. However, his perplexed family can't decide whether Evan is having an extraordinary mid-life crisis or is truly onto something of Biblical proportions.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Life flips over for a small-town pizzeria owner and poet who inherits $40 billion. Sleazy moguls come to whisk him and his money away to corporate America.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Ditched by his parents as a child, Joe Dirt has had to raise himself. Now grown up and working as a janitor Joe sets out to find the parents who abandoned him. Along the way, he befriends a high school janitor, an alligator trainer, the beautiful but untouchable Brandy, and Robby, Joe's rival for her attention. Eventually Joe makes his way to Los Angeles, where a shock-jock brings him on his radio show to make fun of him. But as Joe recounts his story, listeners are captivated, and an entire city starts to tune in daily to hear the adventures of Joe Dirt. Soon audiences worldwide join to help this unlikely hero unearth the mystery of his family's disappearance, with startling results.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world! After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, the three-time defending champs worry that they've lost their harmony for good. With one chance left at redeeming their legacy, they must they must face off against the toughest competition on the planet: German supergroup Das Sound Machine and fight for their right to win at the World Championships of A Cappella. It will take the power of sisterhood to find their voice and see what it takes to be the world's top pitches!

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: The O'Connells must stop a mummy awoken from a 2000-year-old curse who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless, unending service. Doomed by a wronged sorceress, Zi Yuan, to spend eternity in suspended animation, the ruthless Dragon Emperor and his 10,000 warriors have laid forgotten for eons, entombed in clay as a vast, silent Terracotta Army.

programme.title: xXx 3: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: Extreme athlete turned government operative Xander Cage - thought to be long dead - comes out of self-imposed exile and is set on a collision course with deadly alpha warrior Xiang and his team, in a race to recover a sinister and seemingly unstoppable weapon known as Pandora's Box. Recruiting an all-new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself enmeshed in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of world governments.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: It's the nitro-fuelled answer to the question: how fast do you like it? Now an ex-cop on the run, Brian O'Connor hooks into outlaw street-racing. When the Feds strong-arm him back, O'Connor's no rules, win-or-die skills are unleashed against an international drug lord. With his velocity-addicted buddy riding shotgun, and a drop-dead-gorgeous undercover agent dialling up the heat, this film accelerates the action into a desperate race for survival, justice and mind-blowing, jaw-dropping speed.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: Supplying sophisticated and hugely expensive artificial organs to those in need, multinational company The Union has a virtual monopoly on life and death. Unfortunately, for those who can't keep up the repayments, the firm's repo men are despatched to reclaim company property - no matter the consequences for the customer. After suffering a heart attack on the job, top repo man Remy wakes to find the company have fitted him with the latest heart replacement, along with a sizeable debt repayment. Unable to make the payments, and rapidly losing his taste for the job, Remy goes on the run, teaming up with his former wife, Beth, who is also fleeing the system.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Wesley's life is over, his pathetic old one, anyway. Fortunately, it is all because of a girl. Enter sizzling-hot Fox, who crashes into his life and introduces him to the Fraternity, a secret society of assassins, led by the enigmatic Sloan. Seems Wes's long-lost father was killed while working for the Fraternity and Wes has been selected to target the rogue member who murdered him. But before he can complete his assignment, Wes must first uncover the dark secrets behind the Fraternity in order to determine his own destiny.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid is a slacker by day, party animal by night, until he finds a serious career that's seriously cool: crime-fighting action hero. As the Green Hornet, he teams up with gadget wiz and martial arts master Kato to take down LA's underworld.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When convicted street racer Sean Boswell tries to start a new life on the other side of the world, his obsession with racing sets him on a collision course with the Japanese underworld. To survive, he will have to master drifting - a new style of racing where tricked-out cars slide through hairpin turns, defying gravity and death for the ultimate road rush.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When detectives Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: From the Central Asian mountains to the deserts of Egypt, through the crowded streets of Paris, to beneath the ice cap of the North Pole, the elite team of operatives known as GI Joe journey on a nonstop adventure, as they use the latest in next-generation spy technology and military equipment to fight the duplicitous arms dealer Destro, and the growing threat of the mysterious Cobra organisation from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: A harrowing war drama where two Black Hawk helicopters are shot down over Mogadishu, trapping an elite team of American soldiers in a 15-hour firefight as they try to recover their fallen comrades.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is a broken man after he loses everything including his job and fiancee. Just when his life is at its lowest, he becomes host to an alien symbiote which results in extraordinary superpowers - transforming him into Venom. Will these powers be enough for this new lethal protector to defeat great evil forces, especially against the far stronger and more weaponized symbiote rival, Riot?

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: After returning from Afghanistan disillusioned and homeless, an ex-Special Forces soldier returns home a damaged man, struggling to find justice in a world saturated with violence in this gritty, explosive story about London's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: In this sequel, the GI Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra, they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Robin of Loxley returns to England after years of fighting in Crusades to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all by the command of the ruthless Sheriff of Nottingham. Learning that his death has been falsely reported and his love, Marian, is involved with a local politician, Robin and co-conspirator Little John launch a covert crusade against the corruption. Robin uses his lethal archery skills to intercept tax collections destined for the Sheriff's coffers, which he turns over anonymously to Marian, now a leader of the clandestine grassroots rebellion. Discovering a larger conspiracy that threatens the stability of Europe, Robin and his men launch an attack that solidifies his status as a legendary and unstoppable rebel leader.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: After the death of her mother, Evie is approached by an unknown cousin who invites her to a lavish wedding in the English countryside. Soon, she realises a gothic conspiracy is afoot and must fight for survival as she uncovers twisted secrets in her family's history.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper is the lone security repairman stationed on a desolate, nearly-ruined future Earth. When he rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft, her arrival triggers a nonstop chain of events that forces him to question everything he knows, and leaves humanity's fate in his hands.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: The year is 1462 and Transylvania has enjoyed a prolonged period of peace under the just and fair rule of the battle-weary Vlad III, the prince of Wallachia. But when Sultan Mehmed II demands 1000 of Wallachia's boys including Vlad's own son to become child soldiers in his army, Vlad must enter into a Faustian bargain to save his family and his people. He gains the strength of 100 men, the speed of a falling star and the power to crush his enemies. In exchange, he's inflicted with an insatiable thirst for human blood that could force him into a life of darkness and destroy all that he holds dear.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a US Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for weapons of mass destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs. Crash landing, with no memory of his past, Bumblebee takes refuge in a junkyard disguised as a VW Beetle. Charlie (Hailee Steinfeld), a teenager trying to find her place in the world, discovers and repairs the battle-scarred robot. When the Decepticons forge an alliance with a secret agency led by Agent Burns (John Cena) to hunt down the remaining Autobots, Bumblebee and Charlie team up to protect the world in an action-packed adventure filled with humour and heart that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Adventurer Rick O'Connell and Egyptologist Evelyn Carnahan discover the lost city of Hamunaptra, and struggle to save the world from unspeakable evil after they inadvertently stumble upon a mummy's tomb in 1923, and the mummy is accidentally resurrected.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime. The one thing that, he didn't plan on was being double-crossed. Now he wants more than the job's payoff...he wants payback.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on naval war games exercise.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for the terrorist bombing of the Kremlin, IMF operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) is disavowed along with the rest of the agency when the President initiates 'Ghost Protocol'. Left without any resources or backup, Ethan must find a way to clear his agency's name and prevent another attack. To complicate matters further, Ethan is forced to embark on this mission with a team of fellow IMF fugitives whose personal motives he does not fully know.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving the future lies buried in the secrets of the past and the hidden history of Transformers on Earth. Now, it's up to the unlikely alliance of Cade Yeager, Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the world.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Over one day across the streets of LA, three lives will change forever. Desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiralling into the most insane escape.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Warcraft: The Beginning
programme.desc: The peaceful realm of Azeroth stands on the brink of war as its civilisation faces a fearsome race of invaders: Orc warriors fleeing their dying home to colonise another. As a portal opens to connect the two worlds, one army faces destruction and the other faces extinction. From opposing sides, two heroes are set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home. So begins a spectacular saga of power and sacrifice in which war has many faces, and everyone fights for something.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with a young crew's maiden voyage on board the most advanced starship ever created: the USS Enterprise. In the midst of an incredible journey full of optimism, intrigue, comedy and cosmic peril, the new recruits must find a way to stop an evil being whose mission of vengeance threatens all of mankind. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: Two cops are dispatched by the otherworldly Rest In Peace Department to protect and serve the living from an increasingly destructive array of souls who refuse to move peacefully to the other side. Veteran sheriff Roy Pulsifer has spent his career with the legendary police force known as RIPD, tracking monstrous spirits who are cleverly disguised as ordinary people.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Dom Toretto and Brian O'Conner lead a reunion of returning all-stars from every chapter of the explosive franchise built on speed to assemble for a high-stakes race that places an unlikely alliance of cops and racers in from Rio de Janeiro. The team must also defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all dead. A dogged federal agent whose strike team tears through South America in hot pursuit, but soon has a difficult time determining the good men from the bad.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers, whose mastermind is aided by the love Dom thought was dead, Letty. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level, so Hobbs asks for the help of Dom and his elite team.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: Set in ancient China, a mercenary travels east in search of gunpowder and discovers the mighty Great Wall and the terrible secret behind why it was built.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: After returning from Afghanistan disillusioned and homeless, an ex-Special Forces soldier returns home a damaged man, struggling to find justice in a world saturated with violence in this gritty, explosive story about London's criminal underworld.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: If they hear you, they hunt you. In this terrifyingly suspenseful thriller, a family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound. Knowing that even the slightest whisper or footstep can bring death, Evelyn and Lee Abbott are determined to find a way to protect their children at all costs while they desperately search for a way to fight back.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Wesley's life is over, his pathetic old one, anyway. Fortunately, it is all because of a girl. Enter sizzling-hot Fox, who crashes into his life and introduces him to the Fraternity, a secret society of assassins, led by the enigmatic Sloan. Seems Wes's long-lost father was killed while working for the Fraternity and Wes has been selected to target the rogue member who murdered him. But before he can complete his assignment, Wes must first uncover the dark secrets behind the Fraternity in order to determine his own destiny.

programme.title: Dead Again in Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected in the British Museum, the mummy walks the Earth once more, determined to fulfil his quest for immortality. An even more powerful force born of the darkest rituals of ancient Egypt has also been set loose in the world. When these two forces clash, the fate of the world will hang in the balance, sending the O'Connells on a desperate race to save the world.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: The city needs heroes. Darkness has settled over New York City as Shredder and his evil Foot Clan have an iron grip on everything from the police to the politicians. The future is grim until four unlikely outcast brothers rise from the sewers and discover their destiny as Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. The Turtles must work with fearless reporter April O'Neil and her wise-cracking cameraman Vern Fenwick to save the city and unravel Shredder's diabolical plan.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: When the crew of the Enterprise is called back home, they find an unstoppable force of terror from within their own organisation has detonated the fleet and everything it stands for, leaving our world in a state of crisis. With a personal score to settle, Captain Kirk leads a manhunt to a war zone world to capture a one man weapon of mass destruction. As our heroes are propelled into an epic chess game of life and death, love will be challenged, friendships will be torn apart, and sacrifices must be made for the only family Kirk has left: his crew.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: Capitol Policeman John Cale has just been denied his dream job with the Secret Service of protecting President James Sawyer. Not wanting to let down his little girl with the news, he takes her on a tour of the White House, during which the complex is overtaken by a heavily armed paramilitary group. Now, with the nation's government falling into chaos and time running out, it's up to Cale to save the president, his daughter, and the country.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: Supplying sophisticated and hugely expensive artificial organs to those in need, multinational company The Union has a virtual monopoly on life and death. Unfortunately, for those who can't keep up the repayments, the firm's repo men are despatched to reclaim company property - no matter the consequences for the customer. After suffering a heart attack on the job, top repo man Remy wakes to find the company have fitted him with the latest heart replacement, along with a sizeable debt repayment. Unable to make the payments, and rapidly losing his taste for the job, Remy goes on the run, teaming up with his former wife, Beth, who is also fleeing the system.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: Targeted by a cold-blooded black ops assassin with a score to settle, their only hope is to get behind the wheel again and secure an ingenious prototype tracking device. Facing their greatest threat yet in places as far away as Abu Dhabi and as familiar as the Los Angeles streets they call home, the crew must come together once again as a team, and as a family, to protect their own.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: In this sequel, the GI Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra, they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Survivors try to uncover the truth behind the evil Umbrella Corp while battling bloodthirsty zombies in the wastelands of Raccoon City.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: The O'Connells must stop a mummy awoken from a 2000-year-old curse who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless, unending service. Doomed by a wronged sorceress, Zi Yuan, to spend eternity in suspended animation, the ruthless Dragon Emperor and his 10,000 warriors have laid forgotten for eons, entombed in clay as a vast, silent Terracotta Army.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team believes that it is dealing with a vigilante when two murder victims turn out to be pedophiles who were exposed as predators on a television program.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team finds a body in a sinkhole, which turns out to be related to an underground bank robbery. The case also involves an incriminating video of a wealthy businessman's daughter with a drug dealer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx's son is a central figure in a murder investigation involving drug dealers, and Alexx does everything in her power to help and protect him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A notorious private investigator becomes a central figure in an investigation into a phony 911 call that ends in death, and he uses information he's gathered about Calleigh and Eric to get them thrown off the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man falls to his death from a skyscraper window, and the new ME is shot and killed at the scene. The crimes are soon connected to ammunition dealers, an ATF agent, and Horatio's sons new stepfather.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman killed in a meth lab turns out to be an informant. CSI discovers that she was having a relationship with her married handler, and that she was also pregnant.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The mother of Horatio's child surfaces and becomes a prime suspect in her husband's murder. She also comes under suspicion when the witness in Horatio's son's trial suddenly disappears before she can testify.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: You May Now Kill The Bride
programme.desc: The bride of a baseball star is shot on her wedding day. Suspects include his best friend and teammate, his bodyguard, and his agent. However, CSI discovers that the bride was not the intended target.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The body of the witness Julia Winston paid off in Horatio's son's trial is found in a swamp, but Horatio's investigation is interrupted by his extradition to Brazil to face murder charges.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Calleigh's kidnappers use her to try and cover up a shooting death that they committed. However, she discovers that the gunshot is not what killed the victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man falls to his death from a skyscraper window, and the new ME is shot and killed at the scene. The crimes are soon connected to ammunition dealers, an ATF agent, and Horatio's sons new stepfather.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: With the help of Wolfe and an ATF agent, Horatio stages his own death as part of a plan to get Ron Saris and a shipment of fused-alloy bullets off the street.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The investigation of a badly burned corpse at a beach party leads CSI to a fuel smuggling ring with ties to human trafficking.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.sub-title: How Does That Make You Kill?
programme.desc: The daughter of Delko's therapist is murdered, and a number of her mother's most troubled and ex-con patients come under suspicion.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead ultimate fighter in The Everglades leads CSI to a case involving extortion and a fight club owned by the Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As the team investigates a bomb explosion that killed a 17-year-old girl in a clothing store dressing room, Horatio discovers that Julia Winston and Kyle are facing new troubles.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The only witness to a Mob-related murder is killed by a runaway crane, but Horatio is determined to make sure the killers are brought to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A tanning butler is found murdered in a hotel bed next to a housewife prostitute. However, the woman claims that she was drugged and has no recollection of the crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A baby girl is stolen from her mother in a crowded area in broad daylight and the investigation takes an unlikely turn when CSI discovers that the mother's husband is not the biological father.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A sadistic killer of young women strikes again, one year after the original crime. However, CSI soon discovers that the trail may lead back to the police officer who investigated the original crime.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: New evidence proves that a man recently convicted of murder is innocent. But are his defense attorney and judge conspiring to keep him behind bars to protect the real killer?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Defense attorney Derek Powell's fiancee is killed during a yacht heist, but the investigation may be compromised when Delko's citizenship is questioned and he is threatened with deportation to Cuba.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man is hanged from a gazebo during his ex-wife's divorce party, and the investigation reveals that he was leading a double life. Meanwhile, Horatio gets Kyle a job working with the medical examiner.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A flight attendant is found dead after a flight in the baggage claim area, and the suspects include jealous co-workers, a drug smuggling Federal Air Marshal, and a pilot cheating on his wife.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While CSI investigates a series of burglaries, Horatio discovers that the team is being watched by Russian mobster Ivan Sarnoff.

programme.desc: Russian mobsters kidnap Wolfe and try to influence him to clear one of their associates who is a suspect in a robbery homicide case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: When the most hated man in Miami is murdered, the CSIs go on the hunt for his killer and his hidden treasure.

programme.desc: When several seemingly unrelated deaths turn out to be part of a sudden outbreak, CSI Woods and Delko return to help.

programme.desc: The CSIs recreate a night of bachelor party debauchery in order to solve a murder and find a missing groom.

programme.desc: An office receptionist is killed with an axe at her workplace, and the team discovers that several employees held grudges against her, as well as a surprising tragic secret from her past.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An Iranian man is burned to death. The prime suspects include Horatio's son Kyle's army buddy Brian, who is on military furlough, as well as Brian's girlfriend. who was the victim's daughter.

programme.desc: Spring Break raises the body count in Miami when the CSI team splits up to solve three different murders.

programme.desc: When a suburban soccer mum is murdered, the CSIs uncover her family's dark past; Delko continues his undercover mission.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team loses one of their own when a psychotic genius runs wild in Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a bottle girl is murdered at an exclusive club, Horatio must search through Miami's most elite guest list to find her killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and the team's only witness is a blind man who heard the abduction, leading Horatio to an old nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the killer of Horatio's wife busts out of prison and goes on a rampage, the CSIs must determine what he's after and find him before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality star is murdered, the CSIs investigate the cast, the obsessed fans and the star's hidden past to find the killer.

programme.title: FairyTale: A True Story
programme.desc: Based on the true story of two little girls in 1917 who had the world believing in fairies. With her father reported missing in action during WWI, Frances goes to stay with her cousin Elise in the country. While playing in the woods, the girls discover some fairies and decide to take some pictures of the wee creatures. When the photographs are declared genuine, crowds of people, led by Sir Arthur Conan Doyle, descend on them to share the magic.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: A gang of tough inner-city kids try to defend their turf against an invasion of savage alien creatures, turning a South London apartment complex into an extraterrestrial war zone.

programme.title: Tea with the Dames
programme.desc: Four old friends will reflect on their lives and careers, as they spend a weekend together at the retreat once shared by Joan Plowright and Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: A historical tale that uniquely explores the all-too-human side of one of history's iconic leaders. Blending literate wit and drama, Hyde Park on Hudson is directed by Roger Michell from a screenplay by Richard Nelson. In June 1939, President Franklin Delano Roosevelt readies to host the King and Queen of England for a weekend at the Roosevelt home at Hyde Park on Hudson, in upstate New York - marking the first-ever visit of a reigning British monarch to America. As Britain faces imminent war with Germany, the royals are desperately looking to FDR for U.S. support. But international affairs must be juggled with the complexities of FDR's domestic establishment, as his wife Eleanor, mother Sara, and secretary Missy will all play a part in making the royal weekend an unforgettable one. Seen through the eyes of Daisy, Franklin's neighbour and intimate, the weekend will produce not only a special relationship between two great nations, but, for Daisy - and through her, for us all - a deeper understanding of the mysteries of love and friendship.

programme.title: Whisky Galore!
programme.desc: Scottish islanders try to plunder cases of whisky from a stranded ship during WWII.

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: Set in modern-day Britain, where drugs are the currency of the day and guns run the streets, Michael Caine stars as Harry Brown, a modest law-abiding citizen, retired Marine and a widower who lives alone on a depressed housing estate. His only company is his best friend Leonard (David Bradley). When Leonard is murdered by a gang of thugs, Harry feels compelled to act and is forced to dispense his own brand of justice. As he bids to clean up the run-down estate where he lives, his actions bring him into conflict with the police, led by investigating officer DCI Frampton (Emily Mortimer) and Charlie Creed-Miles.

programme.title: Set Fire To The Stars
programme.desc: An aspiring poet in 1950s New York has his ordered world shaken when he embarks on a week-long retreat to save his hell-raising hero, Dylan Thomas.

programme.title: FairyTale: A True Story
programme.desc: Based on the true story of two little girls in 1917 who had the world believing in fairies. With her father reported missing in action during WWI, Frances goes to stay with her cousin Elise in the country. While playing in the woods, the girls discover some fairies and decide to take some pictures of the wee creatures. When the photographs are declared genuine, crowds of people, led by Sir Arthur Conan Doyle, descend on them to share the magic.

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: This BAFTA-winning raw drama stars Katie Jarvis in her debut role as Mia, a volatile 15-year-old, who is always in trouble as she has been excluded from school and is ostracised by her friends. When her mother (Kierston Wareing) brings home Connor (Michael Fassbender), a mysterious stranger, a change to their lives looks promising. Trivia: Katie Jarvis lives on an Essex housing estate like the one in the movie, and she was discovered by director Andrea Arnold while in a shouting match with her boyfriend at the Tilbury train station, which is seen in the movie. Now 18, she gave birth to a daughter conceived when she was 16.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: A gang of tough inner-city kids try to defend their turf against an invasion of savage alien creatures, turning a South London apartment complex into an extraterrestrial war zone.

programme.title: Whisky Galore!
programme.desc: Scottish islanders try to plunder cases of whisky from a stranded ship during WWII.

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: Set in modern-day Britain, where drugs are the currency of the day and guns run the streets, Michael Caine stars as Harry Brown, a modest law-abiding citizen, retired Marine and a widower who lives alone on a depressed housing estate. His only company is his best friend Leonard (David Bradley). When Leonard is murdered by a gang of thugs, Harry feels compelled to act and is forced to dispense his own brand of justice. As he bids to clean up the run-down estate where he lives, his actions bring him into conflict with the police, led by investigating officer DCI Frampton (Emily Mortimer) and Charlie Creed-Miles.

programme.title: Set Fire To The Stars
programme.desc: An aspiring poet in 1950s New York has his ordered world shaken when he embarks on a week-long retreat to save his hell-raising hero, Dylan Thomas.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are entering their 30s but are intent on keeping up the hedonistic lifestyle they've become accustomed to. Utterly confident and fearless, the two friends cut a swathe through Dublin, never letting a responsibility get in the way of a good time. When Laura falls in love with the handsome, and extremely disciplined, classical pianist Jim, she begins to question her choices, placing strain on the tight bond with Tyler.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.

programme.title: McKellen: Playing the Part
programme.desc: Built upon a 14 hour interview, McKellen: Playing The Part is a unique journey through the key landmarks of McKellen's life, from early childhood into a demanding career that placed him in the public eye for the best part of his lifetime. Using an abundance of photography from McKellen's private albums and cinematically reconstructed scenes, a raw talent shines through in the intensity, variety and devotion to that moment in the light.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric, grief-stricken mourners. The death of Daniel and Robert's father brings their entire dysfunctional family together to mourn his passing. When a man shows up at the funeral threatening to reveal the deceased man's shocking secret unless he gets some cash, the two brothers are forced to figure out a way to deal with the blackmailer. As they pull out every stop to try and prevent any news from spreading to the guests, the ceremony turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: An Indian family in London tries to raise their soccer-playing daughter in a traditional way. Unlike her older sister, who is preparing for a lavish Indian wedding and a lifetime of cooking delicious dishes, Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero, British soccer superstar, David Beckham. Wholeheartedly against Jess's unorthodox ambition, her parents eventually reveal that their reservations have more to do with protecting her than with holding her back. When Jess is forced to make a choice between tradition and her beloved sport, her family must decide whether to let her chase her dream, and a soccer ball.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse, funny, profane, and dangerous. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut. Travelling with his devoted best friend Dickie, Dom visits his crime boss Mr Fontaine in the south of France to claim his reward. But Dom's drink and drug-fuelled ego decides that what he's lost can't be replaced. One car accident and a femme fatale later, Dom realises that his priority must be to reconnect with his long-lost daughter Evelyn. But Dom does what Dom does best. He screws things up for everyone.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are entering their 30s but are intent on keeping up the hedonistic lifestyle they've become accustomed to. Utterly confident and fearless, the two friends cut a swathe through Dublin, never letting a responsibility get in the way of a good time. When Laura falls in love with the handsome, and extremely disciplined, classical pianist Jim, she begins to question her choices, placing strain on the tight bond with Tyler.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: Professor Phillip Goodman is a renowned sceptic of all things supernatural. Given the opportunity to investigate three cases of baffling paranormal activity, he uncovers mysteries beyond his own imagination, leading to a nightmarish conclusion, both shocking and personal.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric, grief-stricken mourners. The death of Daniel and Robert's father brings their entire dysfunctional family together to mourn his passing. When a man shows up at the funeral threatening to reveal the deceased man's shocking secret unless he gets some cash, the two brothers are forced to figure out a way to deal with the blackmailer. As they pull out every stop to try and prevent any news from spreading to the guests, the ceremony turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: An Indian family in London tries to raise their soccer-playing daughter in a traditional way. Unlike her older sister, who is preparing for a lavish Indian wedding and a lifetime of cooking delicious dishes, Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero, British soccer superstar, David Beckham. Wholeheartedly against Jess's unorthodox ambition, her parents eventually reveal that their reservations have more to do with protecting her than with holding her back. When Jess is forced to make a choice between tradition and her beloved sport, her family must decide whether to let her chase her dream, and a soccer ball.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse, funny, profane, and dangerous. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut. Travelling with his devoted best friend Dickie, Dom visits his crime boss Mr Fontaine in the south of France to claim his reward. But Dom's drink and drug-fuelled ego decides that what he's lost can't be replaced. One car accident and a femme fatale later, Dom realises that his priority must be to reconnect with his long-lost daughter Evelyn. But Dom does what Dom does best. He screws things up for everyone.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady is a surprising and intimate portrait of the late Margaret Thatcher, the first and only female Prime Minister of The United Kingdom. One of the 20th century's most famous and influential women, Thatcher came from nowhere to smash through barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male dominated world.

programme.title: Last Days In The Desert
programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: This film is inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, the illegitimate mixed race daughter of Admiral Sir John Lindsay. Raised by her aristocratic great-uncle Lord Mansfield and his wife, Belle's lineage affords her certain privileges, yet her status prevents her from the traditions of noble social standing. While her cousin Elizabeth chases suitors for marriage, Belle is left on the sidelines wondering if she will ever find love. After meeting an idealistic young vicar's son bent on changing society, he and Belle help shape Lord Mansfield's role as Lord Chief Justice to end slavery in England.

programme.title: Slumber
programme.desc: Alice is a sleep doctor, haunted by the mysterious nocturnal death of her younger brother. Whilst performing an examination on a traumatised family with sleeping problems, Alice is attacked by the father in his sleep. The father is arrested and blamed for causing the family's sleep issues, but when he is thrown into jail and the problems get progressively worse, Alice is forced to abandon scientific rationale and accept that the family is being terrorised by a parasitic demon who feeds on the weak whilst they sleep.

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: A weary assassin hires a gangster's cocky stepson as his driver. A stunning woman upsets their plans in this witty caper starring Tim Roth and Talulah Riley.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Burn Burn Burn
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, two girls embark on a road trip to spread his ashes.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady is a surprising and intimate portrait of the late Margaret Thatcher, the first and only female Prime Minister of The United Kingdom. One of the 20th century's most famous and influential women, Thatcher came from nowhere to smash through barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male dominated world.

programme.title: Last Days In The Desert
programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: Belle

While her cousin Elizabeth chases suitors for marriage, Belle is left on the sidelines wondering if she will ever find love. After meeting an idealistic young vicar's son bent on changing society, he and Belle help shape Lord Mansfield's role as Lord Chief Justice to end slavery in England.

programme.title: The Banksy Job
programme.desc: A documentary exploring the infamous theft of street artist Banksy's sculpture, The Drinker, and the ensuing battle with the art terrorist: AK47.

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: A weary assassin hires a gangster's cocky stepson as his driver. A stunning woman upsets their plans in this witty caper starring Tim Roth and Talulah Riley.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Burn Burn Burn
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, two girls embark on a road trip to spread his ashes.

programme.title: Breathe
programme.desc: For his directorial debut, Andy Serkis brings to life the inspiring true love story between Robin and Diana Cavendish, an adventurous couple who refuse to give up in the face of a devastating disease. When Robin is struck down by polio at the age of 28, he is confined to a hospital bed and given only a few months to live. With the help of Diana's twin brothers and the ground-breaking ideas of inventor Teddy Hall, Robin and Diana dare to escape the hospital ward to seek out a full and passionate life together - raising their young son, traveling and devoting their lives to helping other polio patients.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: This film follows Britain's iconic prime minister, Winston Churchill, in the days before the D-day landings in June 1944. As Allied forces stand on the south coast of Britain, poised to invade Nazi-occupied Europe, they await Churchill's decision on whether the invasion will actually move ahead. Fearful of repeating his mistakes from WWI on the beaches of Gallipoli, exhausted by years of war, plagued by depression and obsessed with fulfilling historical greatness, Churchill is also faced with constant criticism from his political opponents, General Eisenhower and Field Marshal Montgomery.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: A different twist on the world's most famous detective. 1947, an ageing Sherlock Holmes returns from a journey to Japan, where, in search of a rare plant with powerful restorative qualities, he has witnessed the devastation of nuclear warfare. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind, Holmes comes to rely upon his housekeeper's boy as he revisits the circumstances of the unsolved case that forced him into retirement, and searches for answers to the mysteries of life and love before it's too late.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: In Mr Michell's magically buoyant and bittersweet film, Jim Broadbent and Lindsay Duncan play a long-married couple who revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end. Diffident, wistful Nick and demanding, take-charge Meg careen from harmony to disharmony to resignation and back again as they take stock and grapple with love, loss, regret and, disappointment, in their own very English way. When Meg and Nick run into their insufferably successful old friend Morgan, an American academic superstar with a fancy Parisian address played with pure delight by Jeff Goldblum, their squabbles rise to a register that's both emotionally rich and very funny.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffic eastern European people and then enslave them, the women to sex, the men to illegal fights. They cross a local businessman, and a war escalates.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: Laing is a surgeon who moves into a tower on the outskirts of London. The brutalist brainchild of architect Royal, it offers residents everything they need, except contact with the outside world. When the concrete monolith's electrical circuits malfunction, so does the moral compass of everyone inside. Decadence and depravity become the new norm. Fighting and fornication are rampant and warfare between lower and upper floors erupts, while murder barely raises an eyebrow. Amid the chaos, the stinging sociopolitical satire about the thin line between human advancement and de-evolution of the species is unavoidable.

programme.title: Pin Cushion
programme.desc: When a socially awkward teen and her outcast mother become targets for the petty and cruel denizens of their small town, they seek refuge in an elaborate fantasy world of their own making.

programme.title: Breathe
programme.desc: For his directorial debut, Andy Serkis brings to life the inspiring true love story between Robin and Diana Cavendish, an adventurous couple who refuse to give up in the face of a devastating disease. When Robin is struck down by polio at the age of 28, he is confined to a hospital bed and given only a few months to live. With the help of Diana's twin brothers and the ground-breaking ideas of inventor Teddy Hall, Robin and Diana dare to escape the hospital ward to seek out a full and passionate life together - raising their young son, traveling and devoting their lives to helping other polio patients.

programme.title: Tell it to the Bees
programme.desc: A shunned small-town doctor and beekeeper in post-war Britain befriends a struggling mother and son, helping them discover that love can be found in many forms.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: This film follows Britain's iconic prime minister, Winston Churchill, in the days before the D-day landings in June 1944. programme.title: Pin Cushion
programme.desc: When a socially awkward teen and her outcast mother become targets for the petty and cruel denizens of their small town, they seek refuge in an elaborate fantasy world of their own making.

programme.title: Calm with Horses
programme.desc: In rural Ireland, ex-boxer Douglas 'Arm' Armstrong has become the feared enforcer for the drug-dealing Devers family, whilst also trying to be a good father to his autistic young son. Torn between these two families, Arm's loyalties are truly tested when he is asked to kill for the first time.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: In 1924, housemaid and foundling Jane Fairchild has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, but unforeseen events will change the course of Jane's life forever.

programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
programme.desc: Based on Peter Turner's memoir, the film follows the playful but passionate relationship between Turner and the eccentric Academy Award-Winning Actress Gloria Grahame in 1978 Liverpool. What starts as a vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deeper relationship, with Turner being the person Gloria turns to for comfort. Their passion and lust for life is tested to the limits by events beyond their control.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: Sean Bean and Danny Dyer star in this action adventure which documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway. Corporal Bob Rains (Danny Dyer), noted by top military brass for his potential, is drafted into the 30 Commando unit, put together by intelligence operative Lieutenant Commander Ian Fleming (James D'Arcy) to obtain vital German intelligence information. Rains and the other 30 Commando team members, led by Major Jones (Sean Bean) prepare for a dangerous mission to Norway, where the Germans have hidden their valuable radar technology, which, if captured by the Allies, will debilitate the enemy's chances of winning the war. After parachuting into the snowy Norwegian countryside, the 30 Commandos must put their skills to the test, as they battle fierce German opposition, the unrelenting cold and a problem with their return transport, which sees them struggle.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Victor Maynard is a middle-aged solitary assassin with a peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims Rose. Going against his contract he spares her life and unexpectedly acquires a young apprentice in the process but now he must thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client.

programme.title: Calm with Horses
programme.desc: In rural Ireland, ex-boxer Douglas 'Arm' Armstrong has become the feared enforcer for the drug-dealing Devers family, whilst also trying to be a good father to his autistic young son. Torn between these two families, Arm's loyalties are truly tested when he is asked to kill for the first time.

programme.title: The Happy Prince
programme.desc: After being imprisoned in England for his love affair with Lord Alfred Bosie Douglas, Oscar Wilde is penniless and in poor health, stumbling the streets of Paris. Out of prison but a pariah, Wilde swings between grief and a determination to wrest whatever pleasure and beauty he can from the time left.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: In 1924, housemaid and foundling Jane Fairchild has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, but unforeseen events will change the course of Jane's life forever.

His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims Rose. Going against his contract he spares her life and unexpectedly acquires a young apprentice in the process but now he must thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The year is 1939, Indiana Jones and museum curator Marcus Brody venture to Italy in search of Dr Henry Jones, Indy's father. The rescue mission turns into a race to find the Holy Grail before the Nazi's. With Dr Jones's diary as a vital key and the map with no names as a guide, Indiana once again finds himself in another death defying adventure of pure excitement.

programme.title: Duel
programme.desc: A travelling salesman is harassed by a menacing 40-tonne truck on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: Repo Man
programme.desc: Alex Cox directs what is now a considered a classic punk fable where Emilio Estevez stars as Otto, a newly hired repossession man who somehow becomes the partner of Bud, an old hand in the repo business, portrayed by the wonderful Harry Dean Stanton. Otto then becomes swept up in a web of intrigue concerning a huge repossession bounty on a 1964 Chevy Malibu. Bizarre events ensue leading Otto and Bud to an encounter with what seem to be beings from space. This off-beat film has a little of everything: action, comedy, urban decay, police drama, mystery, government conspiracy and even UFOs! A cult classic!

programme.title: K-9
programme.desc: An unorthodox narcotics cop teams with an independently minded police dog in this hilarious action-comedy. Headstrong Dooley is one step away from nailing a prominent socialite in a $50 million cocaine bust. He's branded as too crazy to partner with, and no one will work with him except Jerry Lee, a superbly trained German shepherd police dog with the best nose in the drug-busting business. The unconventional pairing pleases neither partner, but after a series of shootouts, stakeouts, brawls and romantic misadventures, they develop a grudging respect for each other. It's a heart-warming, fast-footed adventure about an unlikely and unbeatable police team that will have you rooting for man's best friend.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befalls their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer. As the body count begins to risine, Sidney her friends find themselves contemplating the "Rules" of horror films as they find themselves living in a real-life one.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: In this suspenseful action tale Jean-Claude Van Damme stars at Darren McCord, a retired fire fighter whose daughter is caught up in a terrorist's audacious plan to take out 17,000 hockey fans, including the VP, unless his insane financial demands are met.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Gabe Walker is a member of the mountain-climbing rescue team. While crossing a ledge 1220m above the Earth, Gabe's friend's equipment fails and she slips out of his hand, falling to her death. Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: Duel
programme.desc: A travelling salesman is harassed by a menacing 40-tonne truck on a remote desert highway.

Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: A former drug kingpin Carlito Brigante is sprung from prison by his high-powered attorney. He stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour. In a life-or-death battle, Carlito takes on the relentless forces that refuse to let him go.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A hilarious saga of a cop, a crook and a beautiful friendship gone sour. Once inseparable pals, Archie Moses and Rock Keats find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. In fact, the only person who hates them more than they hate each other is ruthless drug kingpin Frank Colton, who wants to put them both six feet under! Now, through a strange twist of fate, Moses and Keats are on the run - together. With a little luck, the bungling boys just might get out of this one alive ... if they don't kill each other first!

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: A man is labelled an 'In-Valid' because he was conceived not in the lab, but in love, in a future where 'designer people', forged in test tubes, rule society.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: Away at college, Sidney Prescott thought she'd finally put the shocking murders that shattered her life behind her, until a copycat killer begins acting out a real-life sequel. Now, as history eerily repeats itself, ambitious reporter Gale Weathers, Deputy Dewey and other Scream survivors find themselves trapped in a terrifyingly clever plotline where no one is safe or beyond suspicion.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Cole is sent back in time to save the human race from a deadly virus that has forced mankind into dank underground communities in the future. Along his travels, he encounters a psychiatrist and a mental patient who may hold the key to the mysterious rogue group, the Army of the 12 Monkeys, thought to be responsible for unleashing the killer disease. Believing he can obtain a pure virus sample in order to find a cure in the future, he is met with one riddle after another that puts him in a race with time.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Special Agent Ethan Hunt teams up with the villain's ex-girlfriend to destroy an international conspiracy to sell a deadly virus to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: A former drug kingpin Carlito Brigante is sprung from prison by his high-powered attorney. He stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour. programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Special Agent Ethan Hunt teams up with the villain's ex-girlfriend to destroy an international conspiracy to sell a deadly virus to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two Miami cops must find $100 million in stolen heroin before their department is shut down. With time running out, detectives Burnett and Lowrey track a master thief into the Miami underworld, dodging bullets and bad guys along the way. A sexy witness can identify the suspect, but a mix-up causes her to believe Burnett is Lowrey, forcing the partners to switch identities. Now, between shoot-outs and car chases, married man Burnett has to stick close to their only witness, while playboy Lowrey goes home to his partner's wife and kids to learn the joys of parenthood - the hard way.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected in the British Museum, the mummy walks the Earth once more, determined to fulfil his quest for immortality. An even more powerful force born of the darkest rituals of ancient Egypt has also been set loose in the world. When these two forces clash, the fate of the world will hang in the balance, sending the O'Connells on a desperate race to save the world.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two Miami cops must find $100 million in stolen heroin before their department is shut down. With time running out, detectives Burnett and Lowrey track a master thief into the Miami underworld, dodging bullets and bad guys along the way. A sexy witness can identify the suspect, but a mix-up causes her to believe Burnett is Lowrey, forcing the partners to switch identities. Now, between shoot-outs and car chases, married man Burnett has to stick close to their only witness, while playboy Lowrey goes home to his partner's wife and kids to learn the joys of parenthood - the hard way.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected in the British Museum, the mummy walks the Earth once more, determined to fulfil his quest for immortality. An even more powerful force born of the darkest rituals of ancient Egypt has also been set loose in the world. When these two forces clash, the fate of the world will hang in the balance, sending the O'Connells on a desperate race to save the world.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: There's a traitor in the heart of America's most secret spy network, the Impossible Mission Force. He or she is trying to steal IMF's critical agent list which would give America's enemies the names of every covert operative in the world. When a mission goes badly wrong, agent Ethan Hunt (Cruise) is suspected of being the turncoat and becomes a hunted man. With all the might of IMF now turned against him, Hunt must flush out the real traitor - even if that means stealing the secret list himself.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: The year is 1957, and Indiana Jones is back in a new globe-trotting adventure. Assisted by his former lover Marion Ravenwood, a greaser Mutt Williams, and fellow archaeologist Mac. From Roswell, New Mexico to the lost city of Atlantis, Indiana Jones battles agents of the Soviet Union led by Spalko for the Crystal Skull.

From Roswell, New Mexico to the lost city of Atlantis, Indiana Jones battles agents of the Soviet Union led by Spalko for the Crystal Skull.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests a vagrant hitchhiker, little does he know that he has set in motion a catastrophic series of events. The vagrant in question is in fact John Rambo. Rambo makes a daring escape from the small town jail to the shelter of the mountains and prepares himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: Meet Jack Foley, the most successful bank robber in the country. On the day he busts out of jail, he finds himself stealing something far more precious than money: Karen Sisco's heart. She's smart, she's sexy, and, unfortunately for Jack, she's a federal marshal. Now, they're willing to risk it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Gabe Walker is a member of the mountain-climbing rescue team. While crossing a ledge 1220m above the Earth, Gabe's friend's equipment fails and she slips out of his hand, falling to her death. Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a handful of days an enormous commit would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway in this exciting sci-fi action. Oceans will rise, cities will fall and hope will survive. DEEP IMPACT makes its effect felt in a big and unforgettable way.
